problem: What causes normal proteins to misfold into prions and spread through tissue?
mechanism: Autophagy activation to clear misfolded proteins
hypothesis: If Autophagy activation to clear misfolded proteins is applied to spread, then function improves will occur because the mechanism targets the root cause directly.

experiment.protocol: Mouse model knockout study with 35 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: We cannot solve problems with the same thinking that created them. — Einstein paraphrase
